Declares a function to retrieve text layout information for Pebble processes.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `text_layout_get_info` that returns a pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` object. The function is likely used to retrieve metadata information related to a text layout process. The inclusion of the `pebble_process_md.h` header file suggests that the `PebbleProcessMd` type is defined elsewhere, and this file provides an interface to access that data. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of process management related to text layout.
